proof: Backend registration endpoints reject missing personal_data_consent.
Frontend registration has a required consent checkbox linked to /policy.

acceptance_criteria.text: New users verify email before getting a session
proof: Registration endpoints send verification email and do not create sessions.
verify-email endpoint creates the session only after token confirmation.
set-password requires a token matching users.verification_token.
set-password stores consent before creating a session.

acceptance_criteria.text: Verification UX and resend flow exist
proof: Added resend verification button and backend endpoint.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: python3 -m py_compile src/auth_system.py src/main.py src/messengers_api.py src/core/email_delivery.py
known_gaps: Production migration/deploy not run in this step.
Existing users are not forced to re-consent.
